title: App Limits
subtitle: Set daily usage limits and receive warnings
manualExePlaceholder: Or manually enter full executable path (e.g. C:\Program Files\App\app.exe)
noLimits: No limits configured yet. Add an app above to get started.
limitReached100Body: You have used {{app}} for {{used}} today, which has reached your daily limit of {{limit}}. Consider taking a break.
